subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath turned towards the horizon of Revelation, when the Dawning-Place of verses appeared with majesty and power, that he may remember his Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن اقبل الی افق الوحی اذ ظهر مطلع الایات بالعظمه و الاقتدار لیذکر ربه
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @chastisement and requital
